data.title: Premier Health's Quebec subsidiaries have been barred from public contracts by AMP under LCOP.
data.description: In Montreal on October 2, 2025, Premier Health of America Inc. (TSXV: PHA), a prominent Canadian health technology company, disclosed that its Quebec Subsidiaries - Code Bleu, Placement Premier Soin, Premier Health Nordik, and Solutions Nursing, had received notification from the Autorité des marchés publics (AMP) regarding their inclusion in the Register of Enterprises Ineligible for Public Contracts under the Act respecting contracting by public bodies (LCOP).

data.title: Quantum BioPharma receives final reports for 2 studies for MS drug, nears Phase 2 trial; data supports FDA application.
data.description: Quantum BioPharma Ltd. (NASDAQ: QNTM) (CSE: QNTM) (FRA: 0K91) has received two crucial final reports regarding its potential breakthrough drug for Multiple Sclerosis, known as Lucid-21-302. The reports include a 90-day oral toxicity study and a toxicokinetic study. These studies are essential to support an Investigational New Drug (IND) application with the US FDA for a phase-2 clinical trial in Multiple Sclerosis. Quantum BioPharma is focused on developing innovative assets and biotech solutions for neurodegenerative, metabolic disorders, and alcohol misuse disorders, with drug candidates in various stages of development.

data.title: "Official designated vehicle dispatched to Hong Kong and Macau for 15th National Games, 40 days to opening."
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, as of October 2, 2025, there are only 40 days left before the commencement of the 15th National Games of China, coupled with the 12th National Games for Persons with Disabilities and the 9th National Special Olympic Games. The countdown to these significant events has officially begun.

data.title: Nvidia CEO praises Elon Musk's unique abilities, compares his brain to a supercomputer. Musk could be the first to hit a gigawatt.
data.description: During a recent podcast featuring Nvidia Corp. CEO Jensen Huang, he lauded Elon Musk's exceptional cognitive abilities by likening Musk's brain to the company's chips. Huang made the comparison on the BG2 podcast, hosted by Lex Fridman and John Carmack, highlighting Musk's capacity to store vast amounts of information in his mind. This unique talent allows Musk to efficiently manage the complexities of his multiple ventures. "The way his brain works, the way he keeps scores of information in his head, it’s quite unique," stated Huang, drawing a parallel between Musk and an Nvidia chip. Describing Musk as the ultimate GPU, Huang emphasized Musk's involvement in overseeing at least five companies and pioneering diverse technologies.

data.title: Cizzle Brands expands CWENCH Hydration™ to 510 Petro-Canada stores, boosting its gas convenience retail presence.
data.description: Cizzle Brands Corporation has announced that as of Tuesday, September 30, 2025, CWENCH Hydration™ in its ready-to-drink format will be available in 510 Petro-Canada locations throughout Canada, including numerous key retail stores. This move strengthens the brand's position in the gas convenience retail sector. The company's stock is traded under Cboe Canada (CZZL), OTCQB (CZZLF), and Frankfurt (8YF).

data.title: Shattuck Labs will join a panel moderated by analysts to discuss key learnings from UEGW Conference 2025.
data.description: In Austin, TX and Durham, NC on October 2, 2025, Shattuck Labs, Inc. (NASDAQ: STTK), a leading biotech company in the development of innovative treatments aimed at TNF superfamily receptors for inflammatory and immune-related conditions, shared news of their participation in a panel discussion following the United European Gastroenterology Week (UEGW) Conference 2025. The panel, moderated by analysts Martin Fan, Ph.D. and David Nierengarten, Ph.D., will include insights from key opinion leader Marla Dubinsky, M.D., Director of the Susan and Leonard Feinstein Inflammatory Bowel Disease Clinical Center at Mount Sinai Health System. This collaboration signifies Shattuck’s commitment to advancing therapies in this vital medical field.

data.title: WETEX 2025 in Dubai boosts eco-friendly vehicles competitiveness.
data.description: The city of Dubai in the United Arab Emirates is set to showcase its commitment to sustainability through the WETEX 2025 event. This initiative aims to boost the competitiveness of eco-friendly vehicles in the region. With a focus on promoting environmentally conscious transportation solutions, WETEX 2025 is expected to attract a significant number of participants and experts in the field. This event serves as a platform for discussing the latest advancements in sustainable transportation and highlighting the importance of transitioning towards greener mobility options.
